content.verdict: Raffles Bali is the smallest Raffles in the world — just 32 villas tiered down a five-level clifftop above a private Jimbaran Bay cove, each with its own pool, butler and ocean view. Opened in 2020, it brought Raffles' heritage service polish and Emperor Suite legacy into a contemporary Balinese villa layout. This is an Aman-like scale with Raffles-level service — the best of both worlds, and a real sleeper hit among Bali's luxury honeymoon options.
content.best_room: Book an Ocean Pool Villa on the upper tiers (3 or 4) — you get better ocean horizon views. The lower tiers are closer to the beach but have partially obstructed views from neighboring villas. The Raffles Villa (2-bed) is for anniversaries/celebrations with family.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Butler Welcome
itinerary_7_nights.description: Transfer from Denpasar (25 min — one of the closest). Welcome gamelan ceremony. Villa orientation with your personal butler. Champagne sabering at sunset. Dinner at Rumari, the signature Indonesian-Mediterranean restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Beach Day & Sanctuary Spa
itinerary_7_nights.description: Funicular down to the private cove beach for the morning. Long lunch at The Writer's Bar. Afternoon at the Sanctuary Spa — a dedicated couples' pavilion with private plunge pool and steam bath. Dinner at Loloan or in-villa.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Uluwatu Circuit
itinerary_7_nights.description: Chauffeured day: Uluwatu Temple, Padang Padang, lunch at Savaya clifftop, Kecak fire dance at sunset. Return to the villa. Dinner at Rumari.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Raffles Wellbeing Journey
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day bespoke wellness journey designed by the Raffles wellness guide — ceremony, yoga, massage, tailor-picked herbal tonics, journaling. Quiet evening in the villa with chef's menu.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ubud Day Trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: 75-minute drive to Ubud. Sacred Monkey Forest, a silversmith in Celuk, lunch at Locavore. Home for sunset cocktails at the Purnama Honeymoon Bale overlooking the ocean.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Boat & Snorkel
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private boat charter from Jimbaran to Nusa Lembongan or Menjangan. Snorkel or dive, picnic lunch onboard. Back by late afternoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sabering Farewell
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final breakfast delivered to the villa pool. One last Sanctuary Spa treatment. Butler-packed, sabering farewell, transfer to the airport. Under 30 min to Denpasar — easy departure.

caveats: The cliff terracing means a lot of stairs and funicular rides to get around — not ideal for mobility issues (though staff are attentive).
Jimbaran Bay is calm and the cove private, but the beach is small — don't come for a long-beach experience (Nusa Dua has that).
Because it's newer (2020), trees and landscaping are still maturing — it doesn't yet have the shaded lushness of Four Seasons Jimbaran next door.

faqs.q: Why is this Raffles different from others?
faqs.a: At 32 villas, Raffles Bali is the smallest Raffles property globally (versus 115 rooms at Raffles Singapore). Every guest gets a butler, every villa has a private pool — a villa-collection format rare in the Raffles portfolio.

faqs.q: How does it compare to Four Seasons Jimbaran next door?
faqs.a: Four Seasons is larger (156 villas), more family-accepting, with better-established landscaping. Raffles is smaller, newer, with arguably better service-to-guest ratio and a more contemporary design. Many guests who tried both prefer Raffles.
Raffles has a private cove accessed via funicular — small but exclusive. Jimbaran Bay's longer main beach is a 5-minute walk along the shore.

faqs.q: Is the Raffles butler service real?
faqs.a: Yes — your butler handles everything from unpacking to restaurant reservations to drawing flower baths. Widely rated as Bali's best butler service, rivaled only by Aman.

faqs.q: Is there a signature Raffles ritual?
faqs.a: Yes — the Champagne sabering at sunset (a Raffles tradition since Singapore) performed on your villa deck. Iconic moment.
Rumari (Indonesian-Mediterranean fine dining), Loloan (Balinese contemporary), Purnama honeymoon bale for private dinner, The Writer's Bar. Strong on-property F&B.
